_comment: Example Caelo package registry index (M16-3). Host a file like this in a git repo and point Caelo at its raw URL (Marketplace → Browse → Registry URL). Each 'url' is a raw download link to a .caelopkg bundle. See docs/guides/PACKAGES.md.

packages.name: Spell-check docs
packages.author: Caelo Community
packages.description: Proofread Markdown docs for spelling and obvious grammar mistakes, without rewording.

packages.name: Add license headers
packages.author: Caelo Community
packages.description: Insert or update SPDX license headers across the source files in a project.

packages.name: Python CLI starter
packages.author: Caelo Community
packages.description: A minimal Python CLI project: an argparse entry point, package layout, and a pytest smoke test.
